menu.subtitle: The Phase Walker
menu.tagline: One world, two realities. Learn to slip between Light and Shadow.

howto.title: How to play
howto.goal: Goal: reach the portal at the end. Cyan platforms exist only in the Light, magenta ones only in the Shadow. Shift at the right moment to cross.

hint.move: Use arrows or A/D to move, Space to jump.
hint.phase: Press SHIFT to switch between Light and Shadow.
hint.blocked: Can’t shift here: you would be stuck in a wall.

quit.title: Thanks for playing!
quit.body: You can safely close this tab.

level.label: Level
level.allCompleteMsg: Well done — you crossed every phase of the fractured world.
